insights: The market shows a stabilization trend where the 7-day average (1434) is currently outperforming the 30-day average (1396), suggesting a slight upward momentum despite a minor dip in the last 48 hours.
Unicorn companies are providing the most stable hiring volume, while FAANG+ and smaller firms are exhibiting higher volatility, indicating a cautious approach to headcount expansion.

Data-focused roles (Data Engineering and ML) are showing consistent growth, while Infrastructure and SRE roles have experienced a sharp contraction, signaling a shift in priority toward product-facing development over internal platform scaling.
